subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, the passing of Kai Khosrow hath caused sorrow and grief, yet rest thou assured that this departure is verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی وفات کیخسرو سبب اندوه و احزان شد ولی مطمئن باش که این وفات عین
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
